2007July 1, 2007

🇯🇵 Ibusuki, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Ibusuki, Japan, July 1, 2007 -- July 6, 2007

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2007-07-ibusuki-japan

10 Resolutions

723Plenary
Circulate visualization requirements and evaluate candidate formats
SC4 requests its Secretariat to circulate the completed requirements statement for a two month ballot as soon as it is available, and to initiate in parallel a call for experts to participate in a ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
722Plenary
Invite participation in planning, machining and measurement demonstration
SC4 requests its Secretariat to invite additional countries to join France, Japan, Sweden, UK and USA in the planning, machining and measurement demonstration to be given in Dallas, with a deadline...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
721Plenary
Appoint Nikolaus Ondracek as alternate liaison officer to IEC SC 65E
SC4 nominates Nikolaus Ondracek as alternate liaison officer to IEC SC 65E System engineering and management.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
720Plenary
Appoint Nikolaus Ondracek as liaison officer to ISO/TC 172
SC4 nominates Nikolaus Ondracek as liaison officer to ISO/TC 172 "Optics and Photonics".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
719Plenary
Reappoint Jochen Haenisch as WG 12 Deputy Convener
SC4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Jochen Haenisch to serve as Deputy Convener of WG 12 and approves the nomination of Mr. Haenisch to serve for an additional three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
718Plenary
Appoint Nikolaus Ondracek as WG 2 Convener
SC4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Nikolaus Ondracek to serve as Convener of WG 2 and approves the nomination of Mr. Ondracek to serve for a three year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
717Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors
SC4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-241 |Inhan Kim |Tatsuo Terai |===
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation

Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
